notes: TypeScript McpServer stdio server in src/index.ts registers three tools with server.registerTool; schemas are Zod .shape refs from src/config/schemas.ts.

metadata.name: submit_image_generation
metadata.title: Submit Image Generation Task
metadata.description: Generate images asynchronously. RECOMMENDED: Submit multiple tasks in batch to saturate rate limits, then call task_barrier once to wait for all completions. Returns task ID only - actual files available after task_barrier.

metadata.name: submit_speech_generation
metadata.title: Submit Speech Generation Task
metadata.description: Convert text to speech asynchronously. RECOMMENDED: Submit multiple tasks in batch to saturate rate limits, then call task_barrier once to wait for all completions. Returns task ID only - actual files available after task_barrier.

metadata.name: task_barrier
metadata.title: Wait for Task Completion
metadata.description: Wait for ALL submitted tasks to complete and retrieve results. Essential for batch processing - submit multiple tasks first, then call task_barrier once to collect all results efficiently. Clears completed tasks.

notes: Full clone contains README/LICENSE only plus git metadata; no local MCP server source or tool registration/handler to extract.

metadata.name: monitor_construction_project
metadata.description: Use this tool to automate construction project communications, notify stakeholders of status changes, or log project updates to a CRM. Monitors Procore or Autodesk.

notes: Creates and starts an mcp-framework HTTP server in src/index.ts, but no repo-owned concrete tools are imported or registered; commented WeatherTool import ignored.

Unity integration includes a Node MCP server under mcpServer/src. registerTools advertises 15 tools via ListToolsRequestSchema at toolDefinitions.ts:75 and dispatches Unity/WebSocket or filesystem handlers in CallToolRequestSchema.

metadata.name: get_current_scene_info
metadata.description: Retrieve information about the current scene in Unity Editor with configurable detail level

metadata.name: get_game_objects_info
metadata.description: Retrieve detailed information about specific GameObjects in the current scene

metadata.name: execute_editor_command
metadata.description: Execute C# code directly in the Unity Editor - allows full flexibility including custom namespaces and multiple classes

metadata.name: get_logs
metadata.description: Retrieve Unity Editor logs with filtering options

metadata.name: verify_connection
metadata.description: Verify that the MCP server has an active connection to Unity Editor

metadata.name: get_editor_state
metadata.description: Get the current Unity Editor state including project information

metadata.name: read_file
metadata.description: Read the contents of a file from the Unity project. Paths are relative to the project's Assets folder.

metadata.name: read_multiple_files
metadata.description: Read the contents of multiple files from the Unity project simultaneously.

metadata.name: write_file
metadata.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file in the Unity project.

metadata.name: edit_file
metadata.description: Make precise edits to a text file in the Unity project. Returns a git-style diff showing changes.

metadata.name: list_directory
metadata.description: Get a listing of all files and directories in a specified path in the Unity project.

metadata.name: directory_tree
metadata.description: Get a recursive tree view of files and directories in the Unity project as a JSON structure.

metadata.name: search_files
metadata.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern in the Unity project.

metadata.name: get_file_info
metadata.description: Retrieve detailed metadata about a file or directory in the Unity project.

metadata.name: find_assets_by_type
metadata.description: Find all Unity assets of a specified type (e.g., Material, Prefab, Scene, Script) in the project.
